[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]

- Description: Dealt with bug reported by Kirsten
  
  [4/12/26, 9:19:54 AM] Kirsten Ritschel: Scanned a bag for checkout with my phone. Does self checkout not work anymore?
  [4/12/26, 9:21:26 AM] Kirsten Ritschel: Sold these to my guest:
  2024OSCAR_20250711_NIBS_15
  2024OSCAR_20260330_37
  shonniescott@comcast.net
  
  She send money via Zelle to me.  I just Venmo to you... 
  
  What's the more elegant/direct way to do it?
  
  [4/12/26, 9:28:30 AM] Gary Teh: Ah… 😱
  
  Let me check what’s causing the error
  [4/12/26, 10:01:42 AM] Gary Teh: Received 😊🙏
  [4/12/26, 10:41:28 AM] Gary Teh: Forgot to associated a product image with that row… 🤔
  [4/12/26, 10:41:29 AM] Gary Teh: Also further optimized the script for that portion as I noticed it has been loading slowly everytime I scan a QR code myself when doing a DEMO to shopkeepers
  
  Thanks for catching that. 😊🙏
  
  
  https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1014
